name: Phronesis
description: AI-managed fund that trades Polymarket via TEE-secured strategy. Investors deposit OG, receive PHR shares, and verify performance on-chain.

pillars.title: For investors
pillars.body: Connect wallet, deposit testnet OG, receive fractional shares, and track NAV with Merkle-anchored audit roots.

pillars.title: For operators
pillars.body: Monitor fund health, authorize beta testers, review market feed divergence, and manage the autonomous trading cycle.

pillars.title: On-chain trust
pillars.body: PhronesisFund, MemoriaRegistry, and ERC-7857 agent metadata live on 0G. Execution runs on Polygon via policy-gated Safe.
